name: Tor-n Between Two Worlds
author: Cute Mage
bootlegger: If the Vigormortis dies and a living Scarlet Woman becomes the new Vigormortis, any Minions killed by the previous Vigormortis count as being killed by the Scarlet Woman.
If the Lleech would die and a Scarlet Woman would become the new Lleech, instead the Lleech lives and hosts the Scarlet Woman.
The Minions in a Lord of Typhon game aren't told that their role changed in setup. This is because of the Tor.
